meaning: n.古代的天体观测仪,星盘
examples: The astrolabe had long been the primary instrument for navigation, having been introduced in the eleventh century.
Mariners were also able to fix their latitude by using an instrument called astrolabe.
On the astrolabe, an off - centered circle represents the orbit of the sun - the ecliptic.
Other important navigation tools include: the sextant, the astrolabe, the diptych, GPS devices.
